name: _template
description: Copy this file to <name>.json. One sentence describing what 'done' means.
rubric: Workflow loops only: list explicit, independently gradeable done-criteria here. Delete for convergence loops.
fixPrompt: Describe exactly what the agent should do with the failure output of each check. Reference the loaded skills for patterns. Fix root causes only.
guardrails: Name the specific shortcuts this loop must never take to converge.
onExhausted: Stop. Report the final state of every check, what was attempted in each iteration, and the suspected root cause. Do not retry.
